title: Classitek
description: Modern slim pack aiming to replicate the experience of Tekkit Classic in modern Minecraft
body:
Remember the original Tekkit? It was a lightweight pack, weighing in at 29 mods, that operated as the center of modded Minecraft for much of the beginning of Minecraft's original golden age.

Classitek aims to recreate the simplicity of Tekkit Classic on top of modern Minecraft, using modern rebirth mods:

 - IndustrialCraft^2 -> [Tech Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techreborn)
 - BuildCraft pipes -> [Simple Pipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-pipes)
 - ComputerCraft -> [CC: Restitched](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-restitched)
 - Equivalent Exchange 2 -> [Item Alchemy](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-alchemy)
 - RedPower wires -> [Wired Redstone](https://modrinth.com/mod/wiredredstone)
 - and more!

I'm still trying to seek out replacements for the following, and I don't want to call a version of Classitek "version 1.0" until we have _something_ for them:

 - BuildCraft quarries
   - [Quarry Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quarry-reborn) looks hopeful, but doesn't have a 1.19.3 version.
 - Railcraft
 - Modular Force Field System
   - There is a [version of MFFS for 1.19](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modular-forcefields), but it's based on Electrodynamics rather than Tech Reborn
 - Balkon's Weapon Mod
